input.topic: Sandworm Industroyer2 Ukraine Power Grid Attack Campaign 2022
input.notes: Sandworm (GRU Unit 74455) deployed Industroyer2 ICS malware against a Ukrainian high-voltage electrical substation operator in April 2022, representing a failed attempt to cause a blackout affecting two million Ukrainians. The campaign built on Sandworm's prior 2015 and 2016 Ukraine power grid attacks but used a substantially re-engineered variant of the Industroyer/CrashOverride malware toolset purpose-built for the IEC-104 industrial protocol. ESET and Mandiant jointly disclosed the malware; CISA issued ICS advisory ICSA-22-103A. Ukrainian CERT-UA and partners attributed to Sandworm. Bounded scope: distinct from the 2015 and 2016 power grid campaigns already in the corpus. Conservative attribution: Ukraine CERT-UA and US government confirmed Sandworm/GRU.
